allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: migrate from deprecated Server to McpServer API for v1.1.4

- Replace deprecated Server class with McpServer high-level API
- Remove tools/index.ts and integrate tool registration into OomolMcpServer class
- Use McpServer.registerTool\(\) method for cleaner tool registration
- Eliminate deprecation warnings from @modelcontextprotocol/sdk
- Maintain backward compatibility with existing tool handlers
EOF
\)")
